title: Figure 2 in First steps towards Live-action Virtual Reality Games
author: Clua, Eric
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 2. – Photography of an adult individual of Caranx ignobilis on the eastern side reef slope of the Clipperton atoll on the 4 February 2016. The dorsal profile of steep and nearly straight snout, plus the silvery gray dorsal colour, shading to silvery white ventrally, with numerous scattered, very small black spots, are quite characteristic of this species of jack (Photo E. Clua).

The dorsal profile of steep and nearly straight snout, plus the silvery gray dorsal colour, shading to silvery white ventrally, with numerous scattered, very small black spots, are quite characteristic of this species of jack (Photo E.
